LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT ABM INDUSTRIES INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO TIG'S FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. BECAUSE THE PARTIES ACKNOWLEDGE THAT THEY HAVE AN ONGOING RELATIONSHIP THE DECLARATORY RELIEF SOUGHT IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT COULD PROVIDE SOME GUIDANCE TO THEM REGARDING FUTURE MATTERS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT ABM INDUSTRIES INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO TIG'S FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: James P. Wagoner, Esq. of McCormick, Barstow, Sheppard, Wayte & Carruth LLP 559/433-1300 for pltf/x-deft & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); Blake Woodhall, Esq. of The Roth Law Firm 858/592-6250 for deft/x-complainant & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted - OVERRULED. BECAUSE THE PARTIES ACKNOWLEDGE THAT THEY HAVE AN ONGOING RELATIONSHIP THE DECLARATORY RELIEF SOUGHT IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT COULD PROVIDE SOME GUIDANCE TO THEM REGARDING FUTURE MATTERS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS-DEFENDANT ABM INDUSTRIES INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: demurrer to cross-complaint is sustained with leave to amend. Defendant/cross-complainant has not sufficiently made a pleading to show its claims are not barred by the statute of limitations. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS-DEFENDANT ABM INDUSTRIES INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: because demurrer is sustained with leave to amend, the motion to strike is dismissed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2011 Set For Trial On Nov-07-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-21-11 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 505
